creator: horst.leitenmueller@liwest.at
text:
hello wen,

just a question, the pr=131333 is for release 8.0 current
when i check out the current (i'm working with freebsd 7.1) the port has
no fixed Makefile ?!

whats wrong here ....

i updated the port just a second ago

*default host=cvsup.at.FreeBSD.org
*default base=/var/db
*default prefix=/usr
*default release=cvs tag=.
*default delete use-rel-suffix

extract of the ports-supfile for update

thanx for response

horst

PS: i have also looked on the ports directly
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/java/jboss5/Makefile

the latest revision is 1.47 tagged for 7.2 but there is also 
APP_HOME_FILES=	bin client lib server  
and the common is Missing !




On Fri, 2009-05-15 at 13:47 +0800, wen heping wrote:
> Hi,
> 
>    I have submitted a PR before to fix this bug and it was committed:
> 
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=131333
> 
>    have you update your portstrees to the up-to-date ?
> 
> 
> 
> Regards,
> wen
